rules.name: BP_AutoFill
rules.description: When changing business partner, auto-fill partner address, payment terms, payment method, price list and contact from vendor defaults

rules.name: BP_Location_Fill
rules.description: When changing partner address, auto-fill related fields (tax zone)

rules.name: DateAcct_Default
rules.description: When dateInvoiced changes, auto-fill accounting date with the same value

rules.name: TaxDate_Default
rules.description: When accounting date changes, auto-fill tax date

rules.name: Currency_From_PriceList
rules.description: When price list changes, auto-fill currency from the selected price list

rules.name: Org_Reset
rules.description: When organization changes, reset dependent fields (warehouse, price list)

rules.name: Project_Filter
rules.description: When project changes, filter cost center and other dimension fields

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all editable fields when invoice is processed (Processed='Y')

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Posted
rules.description: Lock accounting-related fields when invoice is posted

rules.name: Product_AutoFill_Price
rules.description: When selecting a product, auto-fill unit price, tax, UOM and description from the purchase price list

rules.name: Line_Calc_NetAmount
rules.description: Recalculate line net amount when quantity, unit price, gross unit price or tax changes

rules.name: Line_Charge_Tax
rules.description: When charge changes on a line, auto-fill tax. Charges are discarded in simplified UI.

rules.name: Line_Conversion_UOM
rules.description: Convert quantities between order UOM and base UOM. Order UOM fields are discarded.

rules.name: Line_AUM_Conversion
rules.description: Convert operative quantity (alternative UOM) to base quantity when Aumqty or C_Aum changes

rules.name: GL_Item_Fill
rules.description: When account (GL item) changes, auto-fill related defaults

rules.name: Line_Recalc_Totals
rules.description: After saving a line, recalculate header totals (TotalLines, GrandTotal) including taxes

rules.name: Match_PO_Receipt
rules.description: When a line references an order line or receipt line, validate quantity does not exceed outstanding amount

rules.name: ReadOnly_Line_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all line fields when parent invoice is processed

rules.name: Tax_Recalc
rules.description: When tax base or tax amount is manually edited, recalculate totals

rules.name: BP_Address_Cascade
rules.description: Partner address filtered to bill-to addresses of selected business partner

rules.name: PaymentMethod_Filter
rules.description: Payment method filtered to methods with payout enabled (purchase side)

rules.name: PriceList_Filter
rules.description: Price list filtered to purchase price lists (IsSoPriceList='N')

rules.name: DocType_Filter
rules.description: Transaction document filtered to AP invoice types (API, APC base types)

rules.name: Project_Status_Filter
rules.description: Project filtered to open/ordered status projects

rules.name: SII_Send
rules.description: Spain SII tax reporting submission. Module-specific, not in scope.

rules.name: SII_Modify
rules.description: Spain SII modification submission. Module-specific.

rules.name: SII_Callouts
rules.description: SII-related callouts (description, authorization, autoinvoice). Spain-specific module.

rules.name: Batuz_Register
rules.description: Basque Country TicketBAI registration. Regional tax module.

rules.name: Verifactu_AddDefaultInfo
rules.description: Verifactu default info callout on doc type change. Spain-specific.

rules.name: Process_Invoice
rules.description: Complete/reactivate/void the invoice. Core document lifecycle action.

rules.name: Add_Payment
rules.description: Add a payment against the invoice. Core AP workflow.

rules.name: Create_Lines_From_Order
rules.description: Copy invoice lines from a purchase order.

rules.name: Create_Lines_From_Receipt
rules.description: Copy invoice lines from a goods receipt.

rules.name: Copy_Lines
rules.description: Copy lines from another existing invoice.

rules.name: Generate_Receipt
rules.description: Generate a goods receipt from this invoice.

rules.name: Exchange_Rate_Calc
rules.description: Calculate exchange rates for multi-currency. Advanced feature, exchange rates entity discarded.

rules.name: Payment_Warning
rules.description: Payment warning on reversed invoice selection. Entity discarded.

rules.name: AEAT349_Rules
rules.description: Spain AEAT 349 reporting fields. Module-specific.

rules.name: Display_PaymentMonitor
rules.description: Show payment monitor fields (totalPaid, outstanding, daysTillDue) only when invoice is processed and not fully paid

rules.name: Display_PaidInFull
rules.description: Show paid-in-full date and days to pay only when invoice is processed and fully paid
